title: UTF-8 panic: byte-index string truncation
description: Using &str[..N] for byte-index slicing panics if a multi-byte character straddles the boundary. Any truncation of user-generated Unicode text (OG descriptions, summaries, etc.) must use .chars().take(N). Audit all string truncation in Broadside.
close_reason: Not vulnerable: feed.rs:truncate_utf8 already uses is_char_boundary for safe UTF-8 truncation. No byte-index slicing on user text found.
